header.description: Transforms text into a concise summary

notice.displayName: Save time with an example of how this node works

operationMode.description: How to pass data into the summarization chain

nodeInputJson.description: Summarize the JSON data coming into this node from the previous one

nodeInputBinary.description: Summarize the binary data coming into this node from the previous one

documentLoader.description: Use a loader sub-node with more configuration options

advanced.description: Use a splitter sub-node with more configuration options

chunkSize.description: Controls the max size (in terms of number of characters) of the final document chunk

chunkOverlap.description: Specifies how much characters overlap there should be between chunks

binaryDataKey.description: The name of the field in the agent or chain’s input that contains the binary file to be processed

summarizationMethod.description: The type of summarization to run

map_reduce.description: Summarize each document (or chunk) individually, then summarize those summaries

refine.description: Summarize the first document (or chunk). Then update that summary based on the next document (or chunk), and repeat.

stuff.description: Pass all documents (or chunks) at once. Ideal for small datasets.

summarizationMethod.description: The type of summarization to run

map_reduce.description: Summarize each document (or chunk) individually, then summarize those summaries

refine.description: Summarize the first document (or chunk). Then update that summary based on the next document (or chunk), and repeat.

stuff.description: Pass all documents (or chunks) at once. Ideal for small datasets.

batching.description: Batch processing options for rate limiting

batchSize.description: How many items to process in parallel. This is useful for rate limiting, but might impact the log output ordering.

delayBetweenBatches.description: Delay in milliseconds between batches. This is useful for rate limiting.
